description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

This program allows children aged 6 months to under 3 years old who live in Hanno and are not enrolled in a childcare facility to use childcare services for up to 10 hours per month, without work requirements.

【Participating Facilities (as of April 1, 2026)】
• Akari Hoikuen Hanno (Yanagimachi 23-6, capacity 9 children, flexible use)
• Sayuri Gakuen (Midoricho 2-5, capacity 12 children, regular use)

【Fees】
300 yen per hour (reduced for families in financial hardship). Meals and snacks are charged separately at actual cost.

【Steps to Use】
1. Apply for recognition (through the Universal Childcare Access Program Support System or the Childcare Department window)
2. After receiving your recognition certificate, receive an email and register a password
3. Register your information in the system, select a facility, and book an initial consultation
4. Complete your initial consultation
5. After the facility confirms acceptance, make a usage reservation
6. Begin using the service

【Important Notes】
• Each facility has limited capacity. If there are many applicants, you may not be able to use the service.
• If the initial consultation determines that special support is needed, you may not be able to use the service right away.
• Parent-child attendance together may be required at first or until the child is comfortable.
• Usage is limited to 10 hours per month. Unused hours cannot be carried over to the next month.
• Cancellation fees may apply when you cancel a reservation.
• Children cannot use the service from two days before their 3rd birthday onward.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kodomoshienbu/hoikuka/13015.html
summary: ℹ️ About the Universal Childcare Access Program (Infant and Young Child Childcare Support)
